questions.question: How many Indian institutions were ranked in the top 100 of the QS World University Rankings by Subject 2021?
questions.explanation: In the QS World University Rankings by Subject 2021, only 12 Indian Institutions found place in the top-100 list.Massachusetts Institute of Technology, USA has retained its top position. Three Indian Institutes of Technology have entered the group of the top 100 engineering institutes. IIT-Bombay is placed at the 49th position in the engineering and technology category.

questions.question: Which is the headquarters of the UN’s Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)?
questions.explanation: The United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) was set up in 1947 by the United Nations Economic and Social Council (ECOSOC).It is headquartered at Geneva, Switzerland. As per the recent report published by the UNECE, trapping and storing carbon dioxide emissions from fossil power generation and industry is needed = to achieve carbon neutrality.

questions.question: Who presented the budget of the Delhi Government for the seventh consecutive term?
questions.explanation: The Delhi government presented a Rs 69,000-crore budget themed on patriotism, for financial year 2021-22. Deputy Chief Minister and state’s Finance Minister Manish Sisodia presented the budget for the seventh consecutive time in the Assembly. It was proposed to allocate one-fourth of the total budget.

questions.question: Which bank has topped the list of the MeitY’s Digital Payment Scorecard for 3 consecutive months?
questions.explanation: India’s largest lender State Bank of India (SBI) has topped the list of the Ministry of Electronics & Information Technology’s (MeitY) Digital Payment Scorecard for 3 consecutive months. The Digital Payment Scorecard tracks the performance of Commercial Banks on various digital parameters. SBI registered the highest UPI transaction volume of nearly 64 crores, and it has processed 67% of the bank’s total transaction volume digitally.

questions.question: Who has been appointed as the Chief of Asset Reconstruction Co India Ltd (ARCIL)?
questions.explanation: Former Central Bank of India CEO Pallav Mohapatra has been appointed as chief of Asset Reconstruction Co India Ltd (ARCIL). ARCIL is India’s oldest asset reconstruction company, and it was founded in 2002. Pallav Mohapatra is succeeding Vinayak Bahuguna as the CEO.

questions.question: Russia has unveiled its joint space plans with which country?
questions.explanation: Russia and China have unveiled plans to work together in the space sector. Both the countries have planned for a joint lunar space station. Russian Space Agency – Roscosmos has signed an agreement in this regard with China National Space Agency, for construction of a research facility on earth or in the moon’s orbit.

questions.question: Which Union Ministry approves PLI scheme for pharmaceuticals?

options.label: D
options.text: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas

questions.explanation: Union Chemicals and Fertilizers Ministry has approved Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for promotion of Domestic manufacturing of Key Starting Materials, Drug Intermediates and Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients. Earlier the Union Cabinet had approved PLI Scheme for Pharmaceuticals over a period of Financial Year 2020-21 to 2028-29.

questions.question: Which state government has signed an MoU with IBM for improving the education standards among girls?
questions.explanation: The Samagra Shiksha Abhiyan (SSA) of Uttarakhand has signed an MoU with IBM to improve the education standards among the female children of the state. The MOU for ‘IBM STEM for Girls’ program, is proposed to be introduced in 130 secondary and higher secondary schools across five districts in the state.

questions.question: Which Indian body released the report ‘India FinTech: A USD 100 Billion Opportunity’?
questions.explanation: The Federation of Indian Chambers of Commerce & Industry (FICCI) and Boston Consulting Group (BCG) released ‘India FinTech: A USD 100 Billion Opportunity’ report. The total valuation of India’s fintech industry is estimated at USD 50- USD 60 billion. The report sees the fintech industry’s valuation at USD 150-160 bn by 2025.

questions.question: Which state is set to start planting of ‘seabuckthorn’ shrubs?
questions.explanation: In the recent budget, the Himachal Pradesh government has decided to start planting seabuckthorn in the cold desert areas of the state. It is a shrub which produces an orange-yellow coloured edible berry, which has been widely used for treating stomach, heart and skin problems. The shrub is found in dry areas such as the cold deserts of Ladakh and Spiti, Himachal Pradesh.
